assignments.name: Assign_Var_for_Product_Tracking_Subflow
assignments.label: Assign Var for Product Tracking Subflow

choices.name: BasedOnFeedbackFromAccountHandoverOppLeadSourceChoice
choices.choiceText: Based on feedback from account handover

value.stringValue: Based on feedback from account handover

choices.name: IdentifiedNeedCustomerUseCaseOppLeadSourceChoice
choices.choiceText: Identified need based on customer use case/industry/team fit

value.stringValue: Identified need based on customer use case/industry/team fit

choices.name: IdentifiedNeedUserBehaviorOppLeadSourceChoice
choices.choiceText: Identified need based on user behavior (e.g. CSM Tool/WeBI/Upsell Reco/etc.)

value.stringValue: Identified need based on user behavior (e.g. CSM Tool/WeBI/Upsell Reco/etc.)

rules.name: WolvesRecordType
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4) AND NOT 5 AND NOT 6
rules.label: Wolves

rules.name: No_Cycle_Price
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 4 AND 6 AND NOT 5 AND (2 OR 3) AND 7
rules.label: No Cycle Price

rules.name: Prospect_Validation_Error
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6 AND NOT 5 AND 7
rules.label: Prospect Validation Error

decisions.name: Was_the_Opp_sent_to_closed
decisions.label: Was the Opp sent to closed?

decisions.name: Was_the_Opp_sent_to_closed2_0
decisions.label: Was the Opp sent to closed?

rules.name: Other_Currencies
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 4 AND NOT 3) OR (1 AND 5)
rules.label: Other Currencies

Flow.description: MIS-7814 - removed rank ranger account source MIS-7609 - remove product sold MIS 7517 - Removed usage of Input_Text_Var variable in the Add Product Flow MIS-7365 - Added Acquired Company MIS-7165 - Fixed Upsell Type Display and Creation MIS-7364-Users can't create opportunities MIS-7165 - Added Upsell Type MIS-6852 - Advisory Services missing from opp creation MIS-6306 - add 42Matters to product tracking and product sold and source MIS 5167 - add Admetricks to product tracking and product sold and source MIS 4973 - overdue invoice screen error Last MIS-4909 - change SI to Sales Intelligence MIS-3616 - Add a new checkbox field API MIS-6946 - Product Tracking MIS-6946 - Allow opening opportunitites only in Initial Discovery phase

formulas.name: CloseDateFormula
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!VarNewRT}, '0120X0000001EYkQ'), null, IF( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Account.Business_Unit__c}, 'Inside Sales'), TODAY()+40, TODAY()+90 ) )

formulas.name: CyclePriceResult
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( {!VarNewRT} = {!Get_Rank_Ranger_Opportunity_RT.Id}, {!CurrencyInput} = 'USD' ), {!CyclePriceInput}, IF( AND( {!VarNewRT} = {!Get_Rank_Ranger_Opportunity_RT.Id}, {!CurrencyInput} <> 'USD' ), {!CyclePriceInput} * {!Get_Exchange_Rate.USD_Exchange_Rate__c},
IF( {!TypeInput} = {!FeatureUpdateTypeChoice}, 0, IF( AND( CONTAINS({!VarNewRT}, '012b0000000M3zQ'), {!TypeInput} != 'Monthly Cancellation', {!Currency_USD} = TRUE ), {!CyclePriceInput}, IF( AND( CONTAINS({!VarNewRT}, '012b0000000M3zQ'), {!TypeInput} != 'Monthly Cancellation', {!Other_Currencies} = TRUE ), {!Get_Exchange_Rate.USD_Exchange_Rate__c} * {!CyclePriceInput}, null ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: StageResult

Flow.label: Create a new opportunity

recordCreates.description: The only difference with Create_Opportunity element is an update of ARR field
recordCreates.name: Create_Rank_Ranger_Opportunity
recordCreates.label: Create Rank Ranger Opportunity

fields.name: NoContactAddContactRoleError
fields.fieldText: 'Contact' can't be '-- None --'. Please press the 'Previous' button and fix your input

fields.name: ContactAlreadyExistsErrorHeader1
fields.fieldText: Could not add contact

fields.name: ContactAlreadyExistsErrorText
fields.fieldText:
This contact is aready related to this opportunity.

Please select a different contact on the previous screen if relevant.

fields.name: AddAnotherOrExit
fields.fieldText: Add Another Contact?

fields.name: CreateMeeting
fields.fieldText: ﻿Inside Sales and Agency opportunities should be created through completed meetings. Please create the relevant meeting to create a 10% opportunity.

fields.name: TypeInput
fields.fieldText: Type:

fields.name: TypePartnershipInput
fields.fieldText: Type:

fields.name: TypeRankRangerInput
fields.fieldText: Type

fields.name: NewSaleHeader
fields.fieldText:
New Sale Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: New Sale

fields.name: UpsellHeader
fields.fieldText:
Upsell Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: Upsell

fields.name: FeatureUpdateHeader
fields.fieldText:
Feature Update Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: Feature Update

fields.name: MonthlyCancellationHeader
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Cancellation Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: Monthly Cancellation

fields.name: PartnershipHeader
fields.fieldText:
Partnership Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c}

fields.name: NewSaleAcquiredHeader
fields.fieldText:
New Sale - Acquired Company Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: New Sale - Acquired Company

fields.name: UpsellAcquiredHeader
fields.fieldText:
Upsell - Acquired Company Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: Upsell - Acquired Company

fields.name: RenewalAcquiredHeader
fields.fieldText:
Renewal - Acquired Company Flow

Account Name: {!Get_Account.Name} Industry: {!Get_Account.SW_Industry__c} Opp Type: Renewal - Acquired Company

fields.fieldText: Stage:

visibilityRule.conditionLogic: 1 AND NOT 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7

validationRule.errorMessage: Can't enter a past date.

validationRule.errorMessage: Can't enter a past date.

fields.name: success
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity was successfully created﻿

Click here to redirect

fields.name: ErrorsHeader
fields.fieldText: Please press the 'Previous' button and fix the below errors:

fields.name: LeadSourceNone
fields.fieldText: Please fill 'Opportunity Lead Source'

fields.name: NoCyclePrice
fields.fieldText: Please fill 'Cycle Price' field

fields.name: PrimaryUseCaseEqualsSecondary
fields.fieldText: Primary and Secondary Use Cases can't be the same

fields.name: ProspectValidationError
fields.fieldText: You can not create a Initial Discovery (10%) opportunity that's not a New Sale, Upsell, or has a price

fields.name: CompetitorProductMissing
fields.fieldText: 'Competitor Product' is required unless 'Using a competitor' is 'Unknown'

fields.name: MissingOtherCompetitors
fields.fieldText: You have selected 'Other' as a 'Competitor Product' therefore 'Other Competitors' is required

fields.name: OtherCompetitorsNotAllowed
fields.fieldText: 'Other Competitors' is allowed only if 'Other' is selected in the 'Competitor Product' picklist

fields.name: MainContactNone
fields.fieldText: Please select Main Contact
